title: PLANET4B expert interview protocol educational case study v2 protocol
author: Czett, Karmen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a semi-structured interview guideline used to interview environmental education experts in the Planet4B education case in Hungary.
